text: Last class you described your daily routine at Telefonica.
Every day, that routine includes writing many emails.

Attachment
Greeting
Regarding
Forward

Dear Mr. Reed, I am writing regarding the NDA.
Could you please review the attached draft?
Please put my manager in CC and forward it to the team.
I look forward to your reply. Best regards, Simone.
Hi Thomas, I just sent my reply regarding the NDA. Did the attachment come through?
Hi Simone, yes, I received it. Thanks for the quick reply, and the subject line was very clear.
Good. In the body, I asked you to review clause four. Could you forward my email to your partner?
Of course. I'll forward it and add him in CC. Should I follow up by Friday?
Yes, please follow up on Friday. I'll sign off now, but reply if anything is unclear.
Will do. I'll reply by email and put the whole team in CC. Thank you, Simone.
Please find the signed draft as an attachment.
Could you reply by Friday and put me in CC?
I'll forward your email to the contracts team.
I look forward to your reply. Best regards.

Hi Simone, this is Thomas Reed from outside counsel. I just sent you an email regarding the non-disclosure agreement. The subject line is NDA, Draft for Review, and you will find the draft as an attachment. In the body, I asked you to check two points: the term length in clause two and the governing law in clause five. Please reply to me directly, and feel free to forward my email to anyone on your team who should read it. If you add a colleague, just put them in CC so we all stay informed. I will follow up on Thursday if I do not hear back. Thank you, and I look forward to your reply.

Hi team, this is Simone. I am leaving a quick note after reviewing the email from Thomas Reed regarding the NDA. A few reminders about our emails this week. First, always use a clear subject line so the recipient knows the topic at once. Second, open with a polite greeting and state your reason in the first line. Third, keep the body short, with one clear request per email. When you reply, do not forget the attachment if you mention one. Please put me in CC on anything sent to outside counsel, and forward Thomas's draft to the contracts team. I will sign off for today, but follow up with me tomorrow if you have any questions. Thank you, and have a good evening.

Thomas sends Simone an email with the NDA draft as an attachment. Simone reads the clear subject line and the polite greeting. Simone replies and asks Thomas to review two clauses. Simone forwards the email to her team and adds a colleague in CC. Thomas follows up on Thursday, and they sign off.
